title: DataplaneUpgradeNotification
description: DataplaneUpgradeNotification schema from SASE Multitenant Notifications

notificationId.description: Unique identifier for this notification delivery.

tsg_id.description: Tenant Service Group identifier for the affected tenant.

region.description: SASE compute region where the dataplane upgrade is occurring, such as us-east-1, eu-west-1, or ap-southeast-1.

currentVersion.description: Current dataplane software version before the upgrade.

targetVersion.description: Target dataplane software version after the upgrade completes.

scheduledTime.description: Scheduled start time for the dataplane upgrade maintenance window.

estimatedEndTime.description: Estimated end time for the dataplane upgrade maintenance window.

status.description: Current status of the dataplane upgrade.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when this notification was generated.
